variables.notes: R:nc. Candidate list clearly misses 'Sales expenses', which is a core SG&A component present in the income statement. No explicit single SG&A subtotal is shown, so selected component rows: Sales expenses + Administrative expenses. Included 'Research and development expenses' as well because it is a separate above-EBIT operating expense and PROF uses (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD). | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales expenses
